title: chrysanthemum platyrachis
intro: Chrysanthemum platyrachis, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum platyrachis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum platyrachis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in Korean and Chinese herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
